'''''Dawn''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was part of an arms deal between the Alliance and the [[Mugaari pirates|pirates]] in a [[Mugaari cargo loading area|cargo loading area]] located in the [[Tungra sector/Legends|Tungra sector]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] learned of this deal and [[Battle of the Tungra sector|attacked]]. [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] inspected the ship to find it containing Rebel advisers. Maarek then destroyed the transport.

*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
